languages.text: {n}Вы уверены, что в официальных хрониках рода фон Валанциус, бережно хранимых историторами, нет ни единого упоминания об открытом противостоянии Себериана и Инквизиции. Летопись повествует об осаде Даргонуса объединенными силами пиратского клана Сенай, что в те времена был одной из главных угроз Простора.{/n}

{n}You are certain that there is not a single mention of an open confrontation between Seberian and the Inquisition in the official chronicles of the von Valancius dynasty, meticulously preserved by historitors. The dynastic chronicles tell of the siege of Dargonus by the united forces of the Saynay pirate clan, which was one of the primary threats in the Expanse in that period.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы уверены, что в официальных хрониках рода фон Валанциус, бережно хранимых историторами, нет ни единого упоминания об открытом противостоянии Себериана и Инквизиции. Летопись повествует об осаде Даргонуса объединенными силами пиратского клана Сенай, что в те времена был одной из главных угроз Простора.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你很确定，在由史官们精心保存的冯·瓦兰修斯王朝官方编年史中，绝无只字提及塞贝里安与审判庭之间的公开对抗。王朝编年史记载的是，达戈努斯遭受了塞内海盗氏族的联合围攻，该氏族在那段时期是扩区的主要威胁之一。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are certain that there is not a single mention of an open confrontation between Seberian and the Inquisition in the official chronicles of the von Valancius dynasty, meticulously preserved by historitors. The dynastic chronicles tell of the siege of Dargonus by the united forces of the Saynay pirate clan, which was one of the primary threats in the Expanse in that period.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你很确定，在由史官们精心保存的冯·瓦兰修斯王朝官方编年史中，绝无只字提及塞贝里安与审判庭之间的公开对抗。王朝编年史记载的是，达戈努斯遭受了塞内海盗氏族的联合围攻，该氏族在那段时期是扩区的主要威胁之一。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous êtes {mf|certain|certaine} qu'il n'existe pas la moindre mention d'un conflit ouvert entre Seberian et l'Inquisition dans les chroniques officielles de la dynastie von Valancius, soigneusement conservées par les historiens. En revanche, les archives dynastiques évoquent le siège de Dargonus par les forces réunies du clan pirate de Saynay, qui constituait en ce temps-là l'une des principales menaces pesant sur les Étendues.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are certain that there is not a single mention of an open confrontation between Seberian and the Inquisition in the official chronicles of the von Valancius dynasty, meticulously preserved by historitors. The dynastic chronicles tell of the siege of Dargonus by the united forces of the Saynay pirate clan, which was one of the primary threats in the Expanse in that period.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous êtes {mf|certain|certaine} qu'il n'existe pas la moindre mention d'un conflit ouvert entre Seberian et l'Inquisition dans les chroniques officielles de la dynastie von Valancius, soigneusement conservées par les historiens. En revanche, les archives dynastiques évoquent le siège de Dargonus par les forces réunies du clan pirate de Saynay, qui constituait en ce temps-là l'une des principales menaces pesant sur les Étendues.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hanedanlığın tarihçileri tarafından titizlikle muhafaza edilen von Valancius hanedanlığının resmî vakayinamelerinde Seberian ile Engizisyon arasında yaşanan açık bir çatışmadan tek bir kelimeyle bile bahsedilmediğine eminsin. Hanedanlık vakayinameleri, Dargonus'un o dönemde Enginlik'teki başlıca tehditlerden biri olan Saynay korsan klanının birleşik kuvvetleri tarafından kuşatıldığından bahseder.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are certain that there is not a single mention of an open confrontation between Seberian and the Inquisition in the official chronicles of the von Valancius dynasty, meticulously preserved by historitors. The dynastic chronicles tell of the siege of Dargonus by the united forces of the Saynay pirate clan, which was one of the primary threats in the Expanse in that period.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Hanedanlığın tarihçileri tarafından titizlikle muhafaza edilen von Valancius hanedanlığının resmî vakayinamelerinde Seberian ile Engizisyon arasında yaşanan açık bir çatışmadan tek bir kelimeyle bile bahsedilmediğine eminsin. Hanedanlık vakayinameleri, Dargonus'un o dönemde Enginlik'teki başlıca tehditlerden biri olan Saynay korsan klanının birleşik kuvvetleri tarafından kuşatıldığından bahseder.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sabes perfectamente que no hay ninguna mención sobre un enfrentamiento abierto entre Seberian y la Inquisición en las crónicas oficiales de la dinastía von Valancius preservadas por los historiadores. Las crónicas de la dinastía solo hablan del asedio de Dargonus por las fuerzas unidas del clan pirata Saynay, una de las mayores amenazas para la Extensión en aquella era.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are certain that there is not a single mention of an open confrontation between Seberian and the Inquisition in the official chronicles of the von Valancius dynasty, meticulously preserved by historitors. The dynastic chronicles tell of the siege of Dargonus by the united forces of the Saynay pirate clan, which was one of the primary threats in the Expanse in that period.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sabes perfectamente que no hay ninguna mención sobre un enfrentamiento abierto entre Seberian y la Inquisición en las crónicas oficiales de la dinastía von Valancius preservadas por los historiadores. Las crónicas de la dinastía solo hablan del asedio de Dargonus por las fuerzas unidas del clan pirata Saynay, una de las mayores amenazas para la Extensión en aquella era.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du bist dir sicher, dass eine offene Konfrontation zwischen Seberian und der Inquisition in den offiziellen, von Historitoren akribisch geführten Chroniken der Dynastie derer von Valancius mit keinem Wort erwähnt wird. Die dynastischen Chroniken berichten von der Belagerung von Dargonus durch die vereinten Kräfte des Saynay-Piratenclans, der in der Ausdehnung zu jener Zeit eine der größten Bedrohungen war.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are certain that there is not a single mention of an open confrontation between Seberian and the Inquisition in the official chronicles of the von Valancius dynasty, meticulously preserved by historitors. The dynastic chronicles tell of the siege of Dargonus by the united forces of the Saynay pirate clan, which was one of the primary threats in the Expanse in that period.{/n}

languages.text: {n}シベリアとインキジシオンの公開対決に関する記述は、歴史家によって丁寧に保存されたフォン・ヴァランシウス家の公式記録には一切ないことを、あなたは確信している。この家系記録は、シベリアとインキジシオンの公開対決に関する記述は一切ないことを、あなたは確信している。この家系記録は、その時代の広大な領域における主要な脅威の1つであったセイネイ海賊団の連合軍によるダゴヌスの包囲について語っている。{/n}
